title: Fenn's Squid
description: With all the animals getting new textures i felt the squid deserved one too! So heres my take on a retextured Squid!
body:
# Fenn's Squid Retexture!
The squid has always been out of date in minecraft, only recieving a minor texture update in 1.14. So heres my attempt at a retextured squid with a more modern look

![Updated squid textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1a40b113b6753e125bba53a0e7f10d4be27c772.png)

## Baby Squid Too!
Theres also support for a custom baby model using [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or Optifine!

![1.1 Baby Squid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a27ee51434209d624404b56b237ea1333a8ca36.png)
